obligations.title: Monthly SLA performance report
obligations.description: Provider shall deliver monthly SLA performance reports within 10 business days of each calendar month end, detailing uptime metrics, incident response times, and resolution statistics.
obligations.penalty: Failure to deliver reports for two consecutive months entitles Client to 5% service credit.

obligations.title: 99.9% platform uptime guarantee
obligations.description: Provider guarantees 99.9% platform availability measured on a monthly basis, excluding scheduled maintenance windows.
obligations.penalty: For each 0.1% below 99.9%, Client receives a 10% service credit on the monthly fee, up to 30%.

obligations.title: Daily data backup
obligations.description: Provider shall perform daily backups of all Client data and maintain backup copies for a minimum of 30 days.
obligations.penalty: Data loss due to backup failure subjects Provider to liability for direct damages.

obligations.title: Annual security audit
obligations.description: Provider shall conduct an independent third-party security audit annually and share the SOC 2 Type II report with Client within 30 days of completion.

obligations.title: Quarterly payment
obligations.description: Client shall pay the quarterly subscription fee of $45,000 within 30 days of invoice receipt.
obligations.penalty: Late payment incurs 1.5% monthly interest on outstanding balance.

obligations.title: Security breach notification within 72 hours
obligations.description: Provider shall notify Client of any security breach affecting Client data within 72 hours of discovery.
obligations.penalty: Failure to provide timely notification constitutes a material breach.

obligations.title: Quarterly business review
obligations.description: Both parties shall participate in quarterly business reviews to assess service delivery, discuss upcoming needs, and review performance metrics.

obligations.title: Maintain $2M liability insurance
obligations.description: Vendor shall maintain professional liability insurance of no less than $2,000,000 and provide proof of coverage upon request.
obligations.penalty: Failure to maintain required insurance is grounds for immediate termination.

obligations.title: Background checks on all personnel
obligations.description: Vendor shall conduct background checks on all personnel assigned to Client facilities or with access to Client systems.

obligations.title: Invoice submission net-45
obligations.description: Vendor shall submit invoices within 15 days of service delivery. Client shall pay within 45 days of invoice receipt.
obligations.penalty: Late payment incurs 1% monthly interest.

obligations.title: Equipment return on termination
obligations.description: Upon termination, Vendor shall return all Client-provided equipment within 10 business days.
obligations.penalty: Client may deduct equipment replacement costs from final payment.

obligations.title: DPIA upon request
obligations.description: Processor shall assist Controller in conducting Data Protection Impact Assessments upon written request, providing all necessary information within 15 business days.

obligations.title: Sub-processor notification (30 days)
obligations.description: Processor shall provide Controller with 30 days prior written notice before engaging any new sub-processor, including the sub-processor's identity and the processing activities.
obligations.penalty: Engaging a sub-processor without proper notice constitutes a material breach.

obligations.title: Data deletion within 30 days of termination
obligations.description: Upon termination, Processor shall delete or return all personal data within 30 days and provide written certification of deletion.
obligations.penalty: Failure to delete data subjects Processor to regulatory penalties and indemnification obligations.

obligations.title: Data breach notification within 48 hours
obligations.description: Processor shall notify Controller of any personal data breach within 48 hours of becoming aware, providing details required under applicable data protection law.
obligations.penalty: Delayed notification may result in regulatory fines for which Processor shall indemnify Controller.

obligations.title: Annual compliance certification
obligations.description: Processor shall provide annual written certification of compliance with all obligations under this DPA, including technical and organizational measures.

obligations.title: Maintain technical and organizational security measures
obligations.description: Processor shall implement and maintain appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk of processing.

obligations.title: Monthly deliverable report
obligations.description: Consultant shall submit a written report of deliverables and progress by the 5th business day of each month.

obligations.title: IP assignment on creation
obligations.description: All work product created by Consultant in the course of this engagement shall be assigned to Client upon creation as work-made-for-hire.
obligations.penalty: Failure to assign IP constitutes a material breach.

obligations.title: 12-month post-termination non-compete
obligations.description: Consultant shall not provide substantially similar advisory services to Client's direct competitors for 12 months following termination.

obligations.title: Bi-weekly invoicing
obligations.description: Consultant shall submit invoices bi-weekly. Client shall pay within 15 business days.
obligations.penalty: Late payment incurs 1.5% monthly interest.

obligations.title: Expense pre-approval over $500
obligations.description: Any expense exceeding $500 must receive prior written approval from Client's project lead before being incurred.

obligations.title: Annual license renewal payment
obligations.description: Licensee shall pay the annual license fee of $120,000 within 30 days of each anniversary date.
obligations.penalty: Non-payment within 60 days entitles Licensor to suspend access.

obligations.title: Annual usage audit compliance
obligations.description: Licensor reserves the right to audit Licensee's usage annually. Licensee shall provide access to usage records within 10 business days of audit request.
obligations.penalty: Non-compliance may result in license termination.

obligations.title: Export compliance
obligations.description: Licensee shall comply with all applicable export control laws and regulations in its use of the software.
obligations.penalty: Violation may result in immediate termination and legal action.

obligations.title: Maintain access logs
obligations.description: Licensee shall maintain access logs for all users of the licensed software for a minimum of 12 months.

obligations.title: Update to latest version within 90 days
obligations.description: Licensee shall update to the latest supported version of the software within 90 days of release notification.
obligations.penalty: Running unsupported versions voids the support warranty.

obligations.title: SOW sign-off within 10 business days
obligations.description: Client shall review and approve or reject each Statement of Work within 10 business days of receipt.
obligations.penalty: Deemed approved if no response within 10 business days.

obligations.title: Change order process compliance
obligations.description: Any changes to scope, timeline, or fees must follow the formal change order process with written approval from both parties.

obligations.title: Acceptance testing within 15 days
obligations.description: Client shall complete acceptance testing of each deliverable within 15 business days of delivery. Failure to respond constitutes acceptance.

obligations.title: Payment net-30
obligations.description: Client shall pay all undisputed invoices within 30 days of receipt.
obligations.penalty: Late payment incurs 1% monthly interest.

obligations.title: Maintain NDA compliance
obligations.description: Both parties shall maintain confidentiality of all proprietary information exchanged under this MSA in accordance with the mutual NDA executed between the parties.
obligations.penalty: Breach of confidentiality subjects the breaching party to injunctive relief and damages.

obligations.title: Weekly time reports
obligations.description: Contractor shall submit weekly time reports by end of day each Friday, detailing hours worked and tasks completed.

obligations.title: Deliverables per SOW milestones
obligations.description: Contractor shall deliver all work product according to the milestone schedule in the attached SOW.
obligations.penalty: Missed milestones may result in payment withholding for affected deliverables.

obligations.title: Equipment return on termination
obligations.description: Contractor shall return all Company equipment within 5 business days of engagement termination.

obligations.title: 6-month non-solicitation
obligations.description: Contractor shall not solicit any Company employees or contractors for 6 months following termination.

obligations.title: Annual tax documentation (W-9)
obligations.description: Contractor shall provide updated W-9 form annually and as needed for tax reporting purposes.

obligations.title: Monthly rent payment by 1st
obligations.description: Tenant shall pay monthly rent of $8,500 by the 1st of each month. Rent received after the 5th is subject to a late fee.
obligations.penalty: Late fee of $250 plus 5% of monthly rent for each day beyond the 5th.

obligations.title: Annual insurance proof
obligations.description: Tenant shall provide proof of renter's insurance with minimum $1,000,000 liability coverage within 30 days of lease commencement and upon each annual renewal.
obligations.penalty: Failure to maintain insurance is grounds for lease termination.

obligations.title: Maintenance request response within 48 hours
obligations.description: Landlord shall respond to all maintenance requests within 48 hours and complete non-emergency repairs within 10 business days.

obligations.title: Comply with building rules and regulations
obligations.description: Tenant shall comply with all building rules, regulations, and applicable local ordinances regarding use of the premises.

obligations.title: 90-day termination notice
obligations.description: Either party must provide 90 days written notice of intent to terminate or not renew the lease.
obligations.penalty: Failure to provide timely notice results in automatic 12-month renewal.
